title: Fredo's Vanilla Items
description: This Mod adds some Vanilla-friendly Ores, Gear and Food
body:
![Logo for Fredo's Vanilla Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f60a7569fbda14c0a094392d510835a430b1ad7.png)

![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-grey?style=for-the-badge&label=MOD%20LOADER%3A&labelColor=yellow)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21,%201.21.1-grey?style=for-the-badge&label=VERSION%3A&labelColor=yellow) 
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-grey?style=for-the-badge&label=SERVER%20SIDE%3A&labelColor=yellow)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-grey?style=for-the-badge&label=CLIENT%20SIDE%3A&labelColor=yellow)

# This Mod adds some Vanilla-friendly Ores, Gear and Food:
- This Mod also adds Crafting Recipes for the Enchanted Golden Apple & all Vanilla Horse Armors
## Armors (Copper, Emerald, Ruby, Enderite) ![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/2a07663b2787d81226ebca588fa164cd2500835c.png)

- Copper Armor is the **SAME** as it's Vanilla version (Recipes, Attributes etc.) , just ported back to older Minecraft 1.21.X versions.
- Emerald Armor recipes are the **SAME** as every other Vanilla Minecraft Armor.
- Emerald Armor is a little stronger than Iron.
- Ruby Armor recipes are the **SAME** as every other Vanilla Minecraft Armor.
- Ruby Armor is slightly stronger than Emerald.
- You can get Enderite Armor by upgrading your already existing Netherite Armor in the Smithing Table using an Enderite Upgrade Smithing Template.
- Enderite Armor is 1.5x stronger than Netherite.

## Tools (Copper, Emerald, Ruby, Enderite) ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/c597c9968c7a36f57fa95870d065880a1d2ec991.gif)

- Copper Tools are the **SAME** as their Vanilla versions (Recipes, Attributes etc.) , just ported back to older Minecraft 1.21.X versions.
- Emerald Tools recipes are the **SAME** as every other Vanilla Minecraft Tool.
- Emerald Tools are slightly stronger than Iron but can't break items that require Diamond Tools.
- Ruby Tools recipes are the **SAME** as every other Vanilla Minecraft Tool.
- Ruby Tools are slightly stronger than Emerald but can't break items that require Diamond Tools.
- You can get Enderite Tools by upgrading your already existing Netherite Tools in the Smithing Table using an Enderite Upgrade Smithing Template.
- Enderite Tools are 1.5x stronger than Netherite and can Insta-Mine most blocks when fully enchanted.

## Ores & Blocks (Ruby & Enderite) ![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/a4789f5e929112d05983892c10b6233f751cbbd1.gif)
- Ruby Ore & Deepslate Ruby Ore generates from Y-64 to Y180.
- Ruby Ore & Deepslate Ruby Ore requires at least Iron Tools to be mined.
- Ruby Blocks can be crafted using 9 Rubies.
- Enderite Ore **ONLY** generates inside the End.
- Enderite Ore requires at least Diamond Tools to be mined.
- Enderite Blocks can be crafted using 9 Enderite Ingots.

## Items (Ruby & Enderite) ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/21e77027efd00560ce99b44afaa493d02f987798.gif)
- Rubies drop from mining Ruby Ores.
- Enderite Shards drop from mining Enderite Ore.
- Enderite Shards are used to craft Enderite Ingots.
- Enderite Upgrade Smithing Templates can only be found inside End City chests.
- Enderite Upgrade Smithing Templates can be duplicated.

## Horse Armors (Copper, Emerald, Ruby, Netherite, Enderite) ![Horse Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/608761121ce4992085b6979207b65df7e762c655.png)
- Copper Horse Armor is the same as it's Vanilla version (Attributes etc.).
- Emerald Horse Armor is a little better than Iron Horse Armor.
- Ruby Horse Armor is a little better than Emerald Horse Armor.
- Netherite Horse Armor is a little better than Diamond Horse Armor.
- Enderite Horse Armor is 1.5x stronger than Netherite Horse Armor.
- All Horse Armors have the same Crafting Recipe as Leather Horse Armor just with their respective materials.

## Apples (Ruby & Emerald) ![Apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JvnlNEje/images/5c09cb3fe6f6b17a646e30d5cb0266c9c5559193.png)

- Ruby Apples give you effects that make you stronger in fights.
- Emerald Apples give you effects that make you a bit more lucky.
- Ruby & Emerald Apples can be crafted like Golden Apples just with their respective materials
- Enchanted Ruby & Emerald Apples can be crafted with Ruby/Emerald Blocks.
- The recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple has been reimplemented and remains the same as it's old Vanilla version.

## Fredo's Armor Trim

- Fredo's Armor Trim can only be found inside Dungeon chests.
- Fredo's Armor Trim can be duplicated.

## Coming Soon:

- Advancements
- Custom Sounds & Updated Textures
- Translation for more languages

## Update Schedule:

- Currently, updates are scheduled to drop at least once per week until all planned features are implemented.

## THE WIKI WILL BE UPDATED AND FULLY FINISHED AFTER THE CUSTOM ARMOR TRIM HAS BEEN IMPLEMENTED

## THE MOD WILL BE UPDATED TO NEWER VERSIONS (1.21.3 etc.) ONCE ALL FEATURES HAVE BEEN IMPLEMENTED AND VERSION 1.0.0 HAS BEEN RELEASED
